steps.assistant_text: Hook dispatcher, 91.3%->exact. NEW FUNDAMENTAL LEVER — -O0 cfe DAG-SHARE: cfe CSEs identical subexpressions WITHIN one expression at -O0; the dispatch must be ONE expression with the register-var assignment EMBEDDED IN THE CALL ARG so the arg's +a0 shares the assignment chain's a0 home reload (no second lw). Assignment in the fn-expr instead evaluates the arg with stale m. Retires the 'interleaved schedule not reachable at -O0' cap.
